74 A1550E_OTHR_MR_DD_CD A1550E_OTHR_MR_DD_CD A1550E MR/DD Status: MR/DD With No Organic Condition Code CHAR 1 The data in this column identifies if the resident has MR/DD (Mental Retardation or Developmental Disability) without an organic condition. -=Not assessed/no information
0=Not checked (No)
1=Checked (Yes)
^=Blank (skip pattern)
